description.chinese: 你站在一个黑暗阴森的洞穴入口。冰冷的风从深处呼啸而出。
description.pinyin: Nǐ zhàn zài yī gè hēi'àn yīnsēn de dòngxué rùkǒu. Bīnglěng de fēng cóng shēnchù hūxiào ér chū.
description.english: You stand at the mouth of a dark, foreboding cave. Cold wind whistles out from the depths.

description.chinese: 你回到了阳光明媚的草地上。洞穴入口在南边。
description.pinyin: Nǐ huí dào le yángguāng míngmèi de cǎodì shàng. Dòngxué rùkǒu zài nánbiān.
description.english: You are back in the sunny meadow. The cave entrance is to the south.

description.chinese: 一条由粗糙石头凿成的狭长走廊。滴水声在远处回荡。
description.pinyin: Yī tiáo yóu cūcāo shítou záo chéng de xiácháng zǒuláng. Dīshuǐ shēng zài yuǎnchù huídàng.
description.english: A long, narrow hallway carved from rough stone. Dripping water echoes in the distance.

description.chinese: 生锈的武器挂在墙上。角落里放着一个破损的铁砧。
description.pinyin: Shēngxiù de wǔqì guà zài qiáng shàng. Jiǎoluò lǐ fàng zhe yī gè pòsǔn de tiězhēn.
description.english: Rusted weapons hang on the walls. A broken anvil sits in the corner.

description.chinese: 金币和珠宝散落一地。中央立着一个石制 pedestal。
description.pinyin: Jīnbì hé zhūbǎo sànluò yī dì. Zhōngyāng lì zhe yī gè shí zhì pedestal.
description.english: Gold coins and jewels are scattered across the floor. A stone pedestal stands in the center.

description.chinese: 潮湿的石墙长满了苔藓。铁链挂在墙上，空气中充满了绝望。
description.pinyin: Cháoshī de shíqiáng zhǎng mǎn le táixiǎn. Tiěliàn guà zài qiáng shàng, kōngqì zhōng chōngmǎn le juéwàng.
description.english: Damp stone walls are covered in moss. Chains hang from the walls, and the air is thick with despair.
